name: Sour Cream Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cut butter into dry cake mix with a fork until the mixture is crumbly.
3. Mix in coconut.
4. Pat the mixture lightly into an ungreased baking pan, 13 x 9 inches.
5. Build up slightly on the edges.
6. Bake for 10 minutes.
7. Arrange apple slices on warm crust.
8. Mix sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle over apples.
9. Blend sour cream and beaten egg, then drizzle over the apple and cinnamon mixture.
- This mixture will not completely cover the apples; it is more of a drizzle than a topping.
10. Bake for an additional 25 minutes until edges are light golden brown.
11. Do not overbake.
12. Serve warm. If your sweet tooth is really raging, serve with French vanilla ice cream.
